This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-v8qf-fr4g-28p2. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.20 contains a scope enforcement bypass vulnerability in the assistant-media route that allows trusted-proxy callers without operator.read scope to access protected assistant-media files and metadata. Attackers can bypass identity-bearing HTTP auth path scope validation to retrieve sensitive media content within allowed media roots.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qgx9-6px9-7p75", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:04:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qgx9-6px9-7p75", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qgx9-6px9-7p75"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T18:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-04-23T18:33:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-v8qf-fr4g-28p2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41908", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/99ef3a63c58440d53f8e45ad861b846032fcb036", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-scope-enforcement-bypass-in-assistant-media-route", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qgx9-6px9-7p75"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Assistant media route missed scope enforcement for trusted-proxy authorization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T21:04:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qgx9-6px9-7p75", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-04T21:04:44Z"}
